nodes.name: Neocossyphus
nodes.summary: Neocossyphus（Neocossyphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如White-tailed ant thrush、Red-tailed ant thrush。

nodes.name: Red-tailed ant thrush
nodes.summary: Red-tailed ant thrush（Neocossyphus rufus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-tailed ant thrush。

nodes.name: Red-tailed ant thrush
nodes.summary: The red-tailed ant thrush (Neocossyphus rufus), also known as the red-tailed rufous thrush, is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Kenya, Somalia, Tanzania, and Uganda. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
